reviews.review_description: Very well optimized, the only app in the market that works and gives you this experience of VR and music.

Good concept, lousy program, it freeze up, songs I tried to play never loaded, the video is jerky, this is how it worked on my Samsung Gear VR, you may have better success. For me, my excitement was dashed, I deleted the program, good luck out there.

It was very sluggish to get going with a few bugs causing it to crash at certain points, BUT some of the 360 videos and concerts were awesome!
Some content even though not in English moved me to tears while listening through good headphones, I felt like I was actually there.
I've been on every VR 360 app on Gear VR, and this is the only one to give me a complete feeling of really being there, and that's probably to to with sound quality and non shaky static camera use.
For some reason the app gets stuck on buffering. I can make the videos work, but the music doesn't sound.
